calendar.matters:
AMENDED ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Dec-14-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha/Gina Gonzales, CSR: Sonia Wong.
Petitioner: Tanya James, present in pro per, was sworn and examined.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name to: A'yona Emari Antoinette Reed.
Decree signed in open court.

AMENDED ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Nov-07-2006 Off Calendar

AMENDED ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Oct-24-2006 Reset To Nov-07-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Bob Balian.
Petitioner: Tanya James, present in pro per, being late and admonished, was sworn and examined.
Matter is continued to Nov. 7, 2006 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 218, for Petitioner to obtain and file Proof of Publication with the Court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Aug-22-2006 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Aug-08-2006 Reset To Aug-22-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Joyce Long.
Petitioner: Tanya James, present in pro per, was sworn and examined.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
Plaintiff was unable to provide a Proof of Publication to the Court, matter is continued to Aug. 22, 2006 at 9:00 A.M. in Dept. 218.
